question: Which compound noun means 'rain that is extremely heavy and fast-falling'?
Which word correctly completes this sentence? 'I don't like holding fish because they are cold and ________.'
Choose the correct future form: 'By the time I'm 40, I ________ so much money that I won't need to work.'
Choose: 'As usual on the show, we ________ you how to reuse everyday items.'
Choose the correct option: 'We ________ meeting early to go to the car boot sale.' (arrangement with another person)
Read: 'I'm going to give these old blankets to the charity shop.' This future form expresses ________.
Which sentence correctly uses 'be + likely + to-infinitive'?
choices: People are likely to live to 100.
correct_answer: People are likely to live to 100.

question: Read: 'It is vital that this is reduced as much as possible.' The phrase 'it is vital that' is used to ________.
Which is the correct formal version of 'All the best, Ibrahim'?
In formal email writing, to make your tone less direct, you use ________.
choices: hypothetical constructions like 'I would ask you to'
correct_answer: hypothetical constructions like 'I would ask you to'

question: Which word completes: 'The orangutan is critically ________ which means it faces a very high risk of extinction.'
Read: 'Animals classified as endangered are at risk of becoming ________.'
Which paragraph of 'They Need Saving Too' tells us about a creature whose body is perceived as useful by some humans?
Which paragraph of 'They Need Saving Too' tells us what kind of creatures get the least funding for research and preservation?
Choose: 'I ________ my relative at the weekend.' (routine visit — normal course of events)
Which phrase expresses that you haven't fully decided something yet?
choices: I'm on the fence about it.
It looks as if we agree.
That's exactly what I was going to say!
correct_answer: I'm on the fence about it.

question: Read: 'I'm torn between going to the cinema and staying home.' This means the speaker ________.
choices: is finding it hard to choose
correct_answer: is finding it hard to choose

question: Which is the correct use of 'whereas' as a signposting phrase?
choices: Whereas is used to conclude a speech.
Whereas is used to contrast two ideas.
Whereas is used to sequence an argument.
correct_answer: Whereas is used to contrast two ideas.

question: Which type of question is designed to make a point rather than get an answer?
Read: 'A big cause of climate change is greenhouse gases.' What does 'give rise to' mean in this context?
Choose: 'Global warming results ________ more water shortages.'
Choose: 'Soil erosion ________ deforestation.' (is caused by)
Read: 'People are likely to live until the age of 100 as a result of better medicine.' What does 'as a result of better medicine' tell us?
choices: Better medicine is the result of longer lives.
Better medicine is a cause of longer lives.
Longer lives result from longer lives.
correct_answer: Better medicine is a cause of longer lives.

question: Which compound noun describes the protective layer of the atmosphere that absorbs ultraviolet radiation?
Read: 'We may have seen some improvement in poverty and crime in recent decades.' The word 'may' here expresses ________.
Which sentence uses 'be about to' correctly?
choices: They are about to leave an hour ago.
The train was about to arrived.
The company is about to launch a new product.
She is about to went home yesterday.
correct_answer: The company is about to launch a new product.

question: Read: 'I'm really bothered by the amount of plastic we use.' Which formal version is correct?
choices: I am bothered about plastic use.
I am deeply concerned by the amount of plastic we use.
I am upset by plastic usage.
correct_answer: I am deeply concerned by the amount of plastic we use.

question: In a persuasive presentation, 'Emotion' as a rhetorical device means ________.
choices: Using emotional language or appealing to the audience's feelings
correct_answer: Using emotional language or appealing to the audience's feelings

question: Choose: 'I ________ to go to the Save the Planet lecture. I've arranged to meet everyone at 5 p.m.'
Choose: 'They ________ arrive at eight, not seven.' (already arranged)
Which word means 'an animal that kills and eats other animals for food'?
Which of these is the correct definition of a 'mammal'?
choices: An animal that lays eggs and has scales
A warm-blooded animal that feeds its young with milk
A cold-blooded animal living in water
correct_answer: A warm-blooded animal that feeds its young with milk

question: Read: 'By 2075 the population of the world ________ to more than nine billion.'
Read: 'Our eating habits ________ change.' (will have to)
Read: 'It is ________ that we will be able to produce enough meat to feed all those people.' (unlikely)
Which correctly expresses a conclusion in a formal email?
choices: I look forward to your response.
To sum up, plastic is bad.
correct_answer: I look forward to your response.

question: Read: 'The future's terrifying text argues that life is unlikely to get better for most people.' What is the main evidence given?
Read: 'In a few years, all of us ________ it!' (future food alternatives — will be eating)
Which word means 'soft material growing on the body of an animal, like a cat'?
Read: 'Five years ________ now, Kamal will have gained his degree in astrophysics.'
